arts.ttl: Preview: Blackburn Rovers vs. Cardiff City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Blackburn Rovers and Cardiff City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Blackburn Station is approximately a mile and a half away from Ewood Park. The car journey from Cardiff City Stadium to the home of Rovers will take approximately three-and-a-half hours, via the M50, M5 and M6.
